enable_rbac_authorization.description: Allows using Azure RBAC for managing Key Vault permissions.

enabled_for_deployment.description: Allows the Key Vault to be used for Azure Resource Manager template deployments.

enabled_for_disk_encryption.description: Allows the Key Vault to be used for disk encryption features.

enabled_for_template_deployment.description: Allows the Key Vault to be used for template deployments.

name.description: The name of the Key Vault.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Allows access to the Key Vault via public networks.

purge_protection_enabled.description: Enables protection against accidental purges of the Key Vault.

sku_name.description: The SKU name of the Key Vault, such as 'standard' or 'premium'.

soft_delete_retention_days.description: Number of days to retain deleted vaults for recovery.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the Key Vault.

tenant_id.description: The ID of the Azure Active Directory tenant that should own the Key Vault.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
